executive_summary: A suspicious individual identified as 'T-800' entered a building through the back alley and was seen carrying a heavy duffel bag. A red Mustang (License Plate: XYZ-987) was parked outside. The suspect transferred $10,000 to an unknown account before fleeing the scene. Discarded evidence includes a crowbar.

reasoning: Witness sighting of 'T-800', suspect's vehicle, transfer of funds

timeline.title: Witness sighting and vehicle observation
timeline.description: Detective John Kim arrived at the scene. A witness named Sarah Connor reported seeing a suspicious individual (T-800) entering through the back alley with a heavy duffel bag. The suspect's red Mustang was parked outside.

timeline.title: Transfer of funds
timeline.description: The suspect transferred $10,000 to an unknown account.
timeline.reasoning: Financial transaction reported by the witness

evidence.description: Discarded crowbar found near the entrance of the building.
evidence.reasoning: Found at the scene and linked to the suspect's actions

evidence.description: Transfer of $10,000 from the suspect's account.
evidence.reasoning: Reported by witness and linked to the suspect's actions
